prompt: Build a 3-floor office tower: each floor is a 10x10 box, 3m tall, stacked with 0m gap. Add 4 small cube windows on each face of each floor.

evaluation_rubric.description: Exactly three floor boxes of size 10x10x3 are created and stacked
Floors are stacked with no Y gap (centers at y=1.5, 4.5, 7.5)
Each floor has at least 4 small cube windows on each of its 4 vertical faces
Window cubes are coplanar with (or slightly inset/outset from) their parent floor face

expected_artifacts: scene with 3-floor tower and faceted windows

prompt: Create a robot arm with 3 segments: base cylinder (radius 0.3, height 0.3), upper arm (box 0.15x0.15x1.0), forearm (box 0.12x0.12x0.8), and a small gripper sphere at the end. Connect them via revolute joints (you may model joints as separate small cylinders) so the arm can swing in the XZ plane.

evaluation_rubric.description: Base cylinder of size 0.3 radius x 0.3 height
Upper-arm box ~0.15x0.15x1.0 attached above the base
Forearm box ~0.12x0.12x0.8 attached above the upper arm
A small sphere acts as gripper at the forearm tip
Output explicitly identifies pivot/joint locations or hierarchy between segments

expected_artifacts: scene with a 3-segment robot arm with explicit joints

prompt: Build a particle fountain: a base cone, a cluster of 20 small spheres above it arranged in a roughly conical spread, and a point light from the base. Spheres should be tinted blue with slight color variance.

evaluation_rubric.description: A cone is present at the base
Exactly 20 small spheres are present
Sphere positions form a roughly conical region above the base (radius grows with height)
Sphere colors vary across slight blue tints (not all identical)
A point light is co-located with the base

expected_artifacts: scene with fountain base + 20 particles + light

prompt: Create a simple maze: a 5x5 grid of cells, each 2m x 2m. Place a wall (0.1m thick, 1.5m tall) on a chosen subset of cell edges so there is exactly one connected path from cell (0,0) to cell (4,4).

evaluation_rubric.description: Grid is 5x5 cells, each 2x2
Multiple wall boxes (0.1 thick, 1.5 tall) exist along cell edges
Walls are exactly 0.1m thick and 1.5m tall (within 5%)
Output explicitly verifies or claims a unique connected path exists from (0,0) to (4,4)

expected_artifacts: scene with a 5x5 maze having a unique solution path

prompt: Build a small village: 5 simple houses in a row 5m apart. Each house is a 2m x 2m base box plus a triangular prism roof (color brown for roof, white for walls). Add a sun (yellow sphere) high in the sky.

evaluation_rubric.description: Exactly 5 houses are present
Each house has both a wall box and a roof prism (or pyramid)
Houses are spaced 5m apart along one axis
Walls white, roofs brown across all houses
A yellow sphere acts as the sun above the scene

expected_artifacts: scene with 5 houses in a row + sun

prompt: Create a clock: a flat white disk (radius 1, height 0.05) lying on the wall (XY plane at z=0). Place 12 small cubes around the rim at hour positions. Add two thin boxes for hour and minute hands, with the hour hand at 3 o'clock and minute hand at 12.

evaluation_rubric.description: A flat white disk of radius 1 exists in the XY plane
Exactly 12 small cubes are placed around the rim at the 12 hour positions (every 30 degrees)
Two thin boxes act as hour and minute hands (different lengths)
Hour hand points toward the 3 o'clock position (+X)
Minute hand points toward the 12 o'clock position (+Y)

expected_artifacts: scene with clock face, hour marks, and two hands

prompt: Build a row of 4 traffic cones (orange) along a curve in the XZ plane following the parabola z = 0.5 * x^2 from x=0 to x=3 (sample uniformly along arc length).

evaluation_rubric.description: Exactly 4 cones are created
All cones are orange
Cone positions lie on z = 0.5 * x^2 within 0.1 tolerance
Cones are spaced approximately uniformly along arc length (not by raw x)

expected_artifacts: scene with 4 cones along a parabolic curve

prompt: Create a parking lot scene: 8x4 grid of parking spaces (each 2.5x5m), painted lines as thin white boxes between spaces, 3 cars (different colored boxes ~1.7x4x1.5) parked in 3 random spaces.

evaluation_rubric.description: 8x4 grid of parking spaces (each 2.5x5)
Thin white boxes act as lane dividers between adjacent spaces
Exactly 3 car boxes ~1.7x4x1.5 exist
Each car is positioned within an existing parking space (not overlapping lines, not outside lot)
All 3 cars have distinct colors

expected_artifacts: scene with parking lot grid + 3 parked cars

prompt: Compose a small chess set: an 8x8 board (alternating black/white squares, each 1x1) plus a row of 8 white pawns (small white cylinders, radius 0.3, height 0.5) at row 1, and 8 black pawns at row 6.

evaluation_rubric.description: 8x8 chessboard with alternating colors exists
8 white cylinders at row index 1 (one per file)
8 black cylinders at row index 6 (one per file)
Each pawn is centered in its tile (XZ center within 0.1)
Pawns are radius ~0.3, height ~0.5

expected_artifacts: scene with chessboard + 16 pawns in starting positions

prompt: Build a gear assembly: a large gear (cylinder radius 1.0, height 0.2) at origin and a small gear (cylinder radius 0.4, height 0.2) tangent to the large one at angle 0 (positive X side). Add 8 small cube teeth around the rim of each gear (do not need to interlock geometrically — visual only). Add a thin metal-gray axle (cylinder) through each gear's center.

evaluation_rubric.description: Two cylinders of radii 1.0 and 0.4 act as gears
Small gear center is at distance (1.0+0.4)=1.4 from large gear center, on +X axis (within 0.05)
Each gear has 8 small cube 'teeth' around its rim
Each gear has a thin axle cylinder through its center
Axles are metal gray

expected_artifacts: scene with two gears + teeth + axles
